sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, str_col String, null_col Nullable(String));
SELECT id, repeat(str_col, 3) AS repeated_str FROM test_table WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE null_col IS NULL);
SELECT id, repeat(str_col, (CASE WHEN id = 2 THEN 0 ELSE 2 END)) AS repeated_str FROM test_table WHERE id NOT IN (1, 4);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE repeat(str_col, 2) NOT IN (SELECT distinct repeat(str_col, 1) FROM test_table) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT str_col, repeat(str_col, 2) AS doubled_str FROM test_table WHERE NULLIF(str_col, '') IS NOT NULL AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id = 3);
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id Int32, value Nullable(Float64));
SELECT t1.id, repeat('Value: ', COALESCE(t2.value, 0)) AS message FROM test_table_2 t1 LEFT JOIN test_table t2 ON t1.id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE str_col = '');
SELECT round(SUM(CASE WHEN value IS NOT NULL THEN repeat(toString(value), 2) ELSE '0' END)) FROM test_table_2 WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table_2 WHERE value IS NULL);
